title: ranunculus septentrionalis var. nitidus
intro: Ranunculus septentrionalis var. nitidus, also known as Northern Buttercup or Glossy Buttercup, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the ranunculus plant species, native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Ranunculus septentrionalis var. nitidus include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and protect against microbial infections, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
